content:
🔥 InvoicePlane | PHP
🎯 Primary Use Case: Managing invoices, clients, and payments for businesses.
✨ Key Features: • Invoice and quote management • Client management • Payment tracking • PHP 8.2+ compatibility • Enhanced security (XSS, LFI, log poisoning fixes)
📖 Summary: InvoicePlane is a self-hosted, open-source web application for managing invoices, clients, and payments. It offers robust features for creating and tracking financial documents, with a recent update enhancing PHP compatibility and security.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
